data.title: Ray Dalio Has A Chilling Warning For President Trump: Debt Crisis Is Imminent, And An Issue Of 'Paramount Importance'
data.description: Ray Dalio, founder of Bridgewater Associates, has raised alarms about the United States' national debt, predicting an imminent crisis.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Predicts Bitcoin Surge To $250,000 By Year-End, Says Current Downturn Is Clearing Out Deadwood: 'Short-Term Pain'
data.description: Arthur Hayes, co-founder of BitMEX, has projected a significant increase in Bitcoin's value, anticipating it will reach $250,000 by the close of the year.

data.title: Apple Reportedly Fights UK Government's 'Unacceptable' Encryption Order Behind Closed Doors — No Press Or Public Allowed
data.description: Apple reportedly challenged a secretive UK government order to weaken iCloud encryption in a closed-door hearing, sparking global privacy concerns and criticism from civil liberties groups.

data.title: NASA, SpaceX One Step Closer To Bring Back Astronauts Butch Wilmore, Sunita Williams Stranded Due To Boeing's Starliner Issues: Replacement Crew Launches Successfully
data.description: NASA and Elon Musk-led SpaceX successfully launched a new crew to the ISS on Friday, aiming to bring back U.S. astronauts Butch Wilmore and Sunita Williams.

data.title: Canadian Grocers Boycott US Products As Tariffs, Trump's Annexation Remarks Worsen Tensions: 'American Booze Is Gone From The Shelves'
data.description: Canadian retailers continue to take a stand against U.S. products, starting with non-essential items such as alcohol.
